estimand_wording: BUNDLED net fixed-budget allocation slope of SHU-MI target_bAcc vs log N at T=200h; bundles coverage + depth + clinical->general POPULATION + within-subject REDUNDANCY; NOT population-adjusted at ANY N
population_confound: N=128 deep endpoint = long-recording clinical (pool 201); disclosed; robust slope excludes N=128
robust_slope_excl_N128_meaning: drops the MOST EXTREME population endpoint ONLY; population drift PERSISTS 256->2048 collinear with log N; NOT a population control
allocation_vs_population_attribution: DECLINED (structurally confounded: deep exposure == clinical population in TUEG-19common; ~201 subjects at deepest threshold cannot reach high N)
budget_units: RAW windows/hours (24000 win = 200h), NOT effective-independent windows (redundancy_ratio 0.649->0.286 => high-N cells carry more effective-independent info at equal raw budget; part of the bundled effect)
honest_narrative: fixing T killed the BL-9 total-data confound but exposed the 3rd face of the T=N*e triangle: depth<->clinical-population. P1 is a DESCRIPTIVE frontier + identifiability lesson, NOT a coverage-vs-depth causal claim.

shape_analysis.note: deployment answer = peak location (how many subjects), not slope sign; single log-linear slope can hide an interior optimum (misread as flat)

val_population_caveat: fixed global val = SHALLOW/general subjects; best-val-loss checkpoint selection rewards general reconstruction; train<->val population alignment IMPROVES with N (worst N=128 clinical-train/general-val, best N=2048); report per-cell train/val alignment + LAST-ckpt robustness alongside best-val; val comparable in DATA not POPULATION
power_disclosure: full-5pt slope resolvable at MDE 0.02 IF points independent; robust-4pt is WEAKEST-powered AND still population-drifting; leave-one-N-out near a small slope may flip; positive-control certifies learned-vs-random NOT slope resolvability. Pre-declared: a straddling CI = 'no detectable allocation effect at 200h' (a valid pre-registered null).
N128_seed_caveat: N=128 draws 128 of only 201 -> ~64% expected pairwise subset overlap across seeds -> N=128 seed-SD measures init noise + correlated subsets, NOT subset stability (disclose)
normalization_granularity: per-PATCH (200-sample) per-channel z-score (pretraining); SHU-MI frozen-probe loader MUST use IDENTICAL per-patch granularity (not per-30s-window) + same EEGNormalizer neutralization (else OOD)
